productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girl's Betsy Navy Kidswear
description: CompositionRaw washed navy denim skirt with halter neck suspenders, button with zippers, elastic garter at the back of the waist, side pockets along with pockets at the hips and pink brand label stitched on the right hipFitting Regular 71 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Let your little girl look like a rock star in this short and pretty skirt. The adjustable halter neck suspender sits comfortably round the neck while the sturdy Levi's trademark buttons with a zipper hold the skirt snugly at the waist, as your little princess prances around with her friends. The pockets on the sides and the back can store her essentials like a little napkin, a few toffees, her clips and her collectibles. Pair this with a round neck pure cotton pink tee and footwear from crocs for that ultimate cute look.
